case_title: VENSIE (No Middle and/or Last Name) VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY, et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF (NO MID/LAST NAME GIVEN), VENSIE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DUCKWORTH, LEWIS DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-01-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-16-2004
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-15-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) LEWIS DUCKWORTH. THE OCT-01-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-15-2004 CONTINUED TO FEB-14-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOV-15-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-15-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) LEWIS DUCKWORTH. NOTICE SENT BY COURT (ORDER AMENDED TO ADD DEFENDANT'S NAME ON THE ORDER)

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO PLAINTIFF (NO MID/LAST NAME GIVEN), VENSIE HEARING SET FOR JAN-20-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL VENSIE'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES, AN MONETARY SANCTIONS (ERRONEOUSLY CALENDAR IN 302) HEARING SET FOR JAN-20-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

REPLY BRIEF RE DEFT CCSF'S MTN TO COMPEL VENSIE'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTEROGGS, SPECIAL INTEROGGS (SETS ONE & TWO), REQ FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCS & REQ FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES, AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFT CCSF
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-20-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET #1 AND #2), REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. BRUCE E. CHAN.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES -- OFF CALENDAR - DISCOVERY MATTER. PLEASE CALL AND CALENDAR THE MATTER WITH THE DISCOVERY DEPT. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-14-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST GILBERT Y. JAY, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-14-2005, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-01-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-14-2005 CONTINUED TO MAR-28-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) LEWIS DUCKWORTH. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF (NO MID/LAST NAME GIVEN), VENSIE

ORDER RE DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL VENSIE'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES(SETS ONE AND TWO), REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING DEFT CCSF'S MTN TO COMPEL VENSIE'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTEROGGS FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUCKWORTH, LEWIS
